title: Papa: RESEARCH BASE!
prompt: Wide mid-shot on the dry sand of @beach-shore. @Papa already crouched on one knee on the sand with @Sara on his LEFT and @Eva on his RIGHT, both kids leaning in close. Papa is gesturing with both arms wide like he's drawing a giant invisible castle in the air. Papa (eyes lit up, theatrical hand gestures): "You know what every rescue mission needs? A RE-SEARCH. BASE!" Sara (eyes huge, mouth agape): "Like a CASTLE?" Eva (jumping up and down on her knees): "With TURRETS?!" Papa (grabbing a yellow plastic bucket and a red shovel from the sand): "With turrets, a MOAT, and a flag on top! Let's BUILD!" The two girls cheer in unison.
